svg.title: VecAdvisor synthetic crossover
svg.desc: Filtered vector search crossover chart for synthetic sweep results.
svg.text: backend: synthetic | points: 12 | recall target: 0.9 | returns-k target: 1 | prediction match: 100.0% | postfilter failures: 12
Solid lines show p95 latency. Lower thin lines show recall@k. Squares are measured winners; circles are predicted winners.
